# SACrashDetectionEvent.Response.attempted

**Case**

The system attempted to dial the Emergency SOS - Call After Severe Crash provider.

## Declaration

```swift
case attempted
```

## Determining responses

- **SACrashDetectionEvent.Response.disabled**: The system couldn’t contact the Emergency SOS - Call After Severe Crash provider because the feature is off in the Settings app.
